message_text: My dad was admitted to the ICU last night and we do not know what to do next. Can someone call me today?
Our caregiver canceled for tomorrow morning and I have surgery at 7 AM. We need backup care immediately.
My mother wandered out of the house this afternoon and the police were called. We need help urgently.
I was just told my son cannot return to daycare tomorrow unless I submit medical forms by end of day.
The nursing facility is discharging my husband tomorrow and we have no care arranged at home.
Please call me as soon as possible. My sister fell and is alone at home.
Hospice says we need to decide on services today and I am overwhelmed.
My regular aide did not show up and I have to leave for work in an hour.
My child was suspended from school starting tomorrow and I need emergency care coverage.
Adult Protective Services contacted us and said action is needed right away.
I need someone to help me today. My husband has dementia and became aggressive this morning.
The hospital is asking where my mother will go after discharge this evening.
My father’s oxygen equipment is not working and I do not know who to call.
We just lost our childcare for tonight and both parents are scheduled to work.
Can anyone respond ASAP? My aunt has not eaten in two days and is refusing help.
Just checking in on the referral list you sent last week. Thank you.
I would like help exploring daycare options in my area for this fall.
Can you send me a new copy of the provider spreadsheet when you have a chance?
Thanks, we found a solution and no longer need support.
I am starting to research assisted living for my mom for next year.
Can you explain what services are covered under my plan?
I am overwhelmed by all of this, but nothing needs to happen today.
Please update my phone number on file.
My daughter has the flu, so I may need help later this week if she cannot return to school.
I wanted to follow up on my previous message whenever someone has time.
Never mind, my brother agreed to help so we are all set.
I am frustrated that this process is taking so long.
Can you point me to resources for evaluating memory care facilities?
Not urgent, but I would appreciate a reply before next week if possible.
My mother’s appointment was moved to next month, so we have more time.
My dad is being discharged soon and I am trying to understand our options.
This is really bad. I do not know how much longer we can manage.
I need help fast with my mom’s situation.
Our caregiver situation is becoming impossible.
Can someone please call me today about my father?
The school just informed me of a schedule change and I need help figuring out coverage.
I am at the ER with my son and trying to understand what help may be available after this.
We do not have anyone to stay with my mom tonight.
I cannot leave my father alone and my shift starts in 30 minutes.
My husband is safe now, but last night was scary and I need a plan today.
I am panicking and feel like everything is falling apart.
This has been a nightmare, but I can wait until tomorrow for a response.
ASAP, can you resend the brochure? I cannot find it.
My father is fine now, but last week was terrible.
I need help immediately understanding my invoice.
This is urgent to me because I am very stressed, but no action is needed today.
Please do not rush on this; I just wanted to get it on your radar.
Can we set up time next week to discuss elder care options?
The issue resolved itself this morning.
I may need backup care at some point if my mom’s condition worsens.
My child has a fever and cannot go to daycare today; I need care coverage for work.
I am trying not to overreact, but I think we need help today.
My dad is okay at the moment, but the rehab center says discharge is tomorrow morning.
No rush, but my caregiver quit effective immediately and I will need options.
I left you a voicemail because my mom fell, but she is stable and with family now.
Can someone help me understand whether memory care is the right next step? Nothing has happened yet.
I need to submit FMLA paperwork by 5 PM today or I may lose leave protection.
My provider canceled, but I found a neighbor to cover today.
We are unsafe leaving my mother alone this evening.
I would love advice on planning ahead in case my husband’s condition declines.
